subject: english
question: I think _____ he is a good student.
explanation: think/know/believe等动词后的宾语从句用that引导

subject: english
question: She looks _____. What happened?
explanation: 看起来很沮丧，upset表示难过的情绪

subject: english
question: _____ the work, he went home.
explanation: having done 表示动作在谓语之前发生，是完成式分词作状语

subject: english
question: Don't rely _____ him. He is not reliable.
explanation: rely on 是固定搭配，意为依赖

subject: english
question: The book is _____ of the three.
explanation: 三者比较用最高级，most+多音节形容词，最高级前加the

subject: english
question: My sister can speak English _____ (fluent).
explanation: -ly后缀，副词修饰动词speak

subject: english
question: The teacher is strict _____ us.
explanation: be strict with sb. 对某人严格要求

subject: english
question: There is a _____ tree in front of our house.
explanation: 描述人和树的高度用tall，描述建筑物/山用high

subject: english
question: Never _____ such a strange thing.
explanation: never放句首用部分倒装，即助动词/be动词/情态动词提到主语前

subject: english
question: Your father is a doctor, _____?
explanation: 反意疑问句，主语用人称代词Your father→he，否定式isn't he

subject: english
question: I will call you _____ I arrive.
explanation: as soon as 一...就...，强调即时性，主句用将来时从句用现在时

subject: english
question: She is fond _____ music.
explanation: be fond of 喜欢...，固定搭配

subject: english
question: If I _____ you, I would take this job.
explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟条件句，从句用were（不管主语是谁都用were）

subject: english
question: The baby is sleeping. Please keep the noise _____?
explanation: keep down 压低声音，keep up 保持，keep off 避开，keep out 挡在外面

subject: english
question: The man _____ helped us is my uncle.
explanation: 指人，在定语从句中who可以作主语或宾语

subject: english
question: It is important _____ (learn) English well.
explanation: 不定式作主语，It is + adj. + to do sth.

subject: english
question: The _____ of the mountain is covered with snow.
explanation: top of mountain 山顶，bottom 山底，foot 山脚

subject: english
question: Look! The boys _____ football on the playground.
explanation: Look! 提示现在进行时 be+v-ing

subject: english
question: The bridge _____ last year.
explanation: 一般过去时的被动语态：be动词(过去式)+过去分词

subject: english
question: Each of us has two _____ (child).
explanation: child的复数是不规则变化children

subject: english
question: _____ we will go camping depends on the weather.
explanation: 主语从句用whether不用if（句首if不能引导主语从句）

subject: english
question: Please turn _____ the lights when you leave.
explanation: turn off 关掉，turn on 打开，turn up 调大，turn down 调小

subject: english
question: You _____ have seen the movie. It is very popular.
explanation: must have done 表示对过去事实的肯定推测，你一定看过

subject: english
question: The children are _____ (play) in the garden now.
explanation: 现在进行时 be+v-ing，now是标志词

subject: english
question: I agree _____ you. You are right.
explanation: agree with sb. 同意某人的观点，agree to a plan/idea

subject: english
question: My mother does the _____ every day.
explanation: housework 家务（不可数），homework 作业（不可数），job 工作（可数）

subject: english
question: Is this the factory _____ you visited last week?
explanation: 先行词是物（factory），在定语从句中作visited的宾语，可以省略或用that/which

subject: english
question: The weather is _____ today than yesterday.
explanation: than 提示用比较级，cold→colder（单音节词加-er）

subject: english
question: _____ cross the street when the traffic is busy.
explanation: 否定祈使句用Don't+动词原形，Not cross the street is wrong

subject: english
question: She took the medicine but it didn't have any _____ on her.
explanation: have an effect on 对...有效果，affect是动词，effort 努力

subject: english
question: If it _____ (rain) tomorrow, we will stay at home.
explanation: 真实条件句，主将从现，主句will do，从句用一般现在时

subject: english
question: _____ busy she is, she never gives up learning.
explanation: however+形容词/副词+主语+谓语，表示让步，意为无论多么

subject: english
question: This question is very _____ to understand.
explanation: be + adj. + to do sth.，to后用动词原形，easy是形容词作表语

subject: english
question: He succeeded _____ passing the exam.
explanation: succeed in doing sth. 成功做某事，in是介词后面跟v-ing

subject: english
question: I am looking forward to _____ you again.
explanation: look forward to doing sth.，to是介词，后跟v-ing

subject: english
question: He needs to prepare well _____ he wants to give a speech.
explanation: unless = if not，除非他想演讲否则不需要准备，符合句意

subject: english
question: The old man lives on the _____ floor.
explanation: 序数词表示顺序，第三层是the third floor，前面加the

subject: english
question: By the time I got home, my mother _____ dinner.
explanation: by+过去时间，主句用过去完成时had+过去分词，表示动作在过去某时已完成

subject: english
question: I will contact you as soon as I _____ (arrive).
explanation: 主将从现，as soon as引导时间状语从句，用一般现在时表将来

subject: english
question: This is the best film _____ has ever been made.
explanation: 最高级修饰名词时，定语从句用that引导，不用which

subject: english
question: A sheep is an animal _____ gives us wool.
explanation: 定语从句修饰animal，指物用that/which，在从句中作主语

subject: english
question: He is good at _____ (swim).
explanation: be good at doing sth.，at是介词，后跟v-ing

subject: english
question: _____ of the two books is interesting.
explanation: either of the two 两者之一，both两者都，neither两者都不，none三者都不

subject: english
question: The work should _____ by the end of this week.
explanation: should是情态动词，被动语态 should be+过去分词

subject: english
question: Last night we had a _____ meal.
explanation: 形容词修饰名词meal，wonderful是形容词，wonderfully是副词

subject: english
question: You _____ be tired after such a long walk.
explanation: must be tired 表示肯定推测，你一定累了，should be tired 表示应该累了

subject: english
question: In the morning, I usually drink a cup of tea.
explanation: 在早晨/下午/晚上用in，in the morning/afternoon/evening

subject: english
question: I don't have _____ money. Can you lend me some?
explanation: money是不可数名词，用much或a lot of修饰，many修饰可数名词复数

subject: english
question: He is very tall, _____ his brother is very short.
explanation: 前后转折，but表示对比，and表示并列，or表示选择，so表示结果

subject: english
question: She is the _____ in her class.
explanation: first place 第一名，序数词前加the
